title: Implement React useEffect Hook
input_format: An effect callback and optional dependency array
output_format: Runs the effect when dependencies change; runs cleanup before re-running
example_output: Effect runs when id changes, cleanup runs before next effect
constraints: Dependencies compared with Object.is. No deps = run every render. [] = run once.
function_signature: function useEffect(effect: () => void | (() => void), deps?: any[]): void
